title: Blo-bi
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Blo-bi''' was a game played by the [[Gwurran]], which involved one person dodging attempts by others to catch him.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
